original_record.body: Dear User, your account will be frozen for non-payment. Click here: https://phishing-site.com/pay now! Contact support 1-800-777-8000. If you think this is a scam, reply to this email.
original_record.subject: URGENT: Payment required now
original_record.label: phishing

judge_result.overall_feedback: The email clearly indicates a phishing attempt with a suspicious URL and a generic sender. The 'If you think this is a scam' statement is a common tactic used by phishers. The schema compliance is low due to the 'urls' field being an integer.

final_record.body: Dear User, your account will be frozen for non-payment. Please update your payment information immediately by clicking here: https://phishing-site.com/pay now! If you have any questions, contact our support team at 1-800-777-8000.
final_record.subject: URGENT: Payment required now
final_record.label: phishing
